spec.name: The Summoning Room
spec.description: This room is darkly lit by a giant glowing pentagram in the center of the room. Bands of force encircle some sort of being trapped inside. You think that going inside would be an EXTREMELY BAD idea...

extra_descs.description: It is centuries old. You don't think standing close by would be a good idea.
You can't see it clearly through the energy field of the pentagram, but you sense that whatever it is, it is very, very, very, very angry.
